title: Fix gateway app-interface payload Kconfig override type
description:
Gateway board builds abort because lichen/apps/gateway/Kconfig adds a default for LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD before the subsystem Kconfig definition with the integer type is sourced, producing a Kconfig warning promoted to error. Add the correct type metadata or otherwise restructure the override so no-hardware board builds can proceed.

## Steps to Reproduce

- Run a no-hardware gateway board build such as west build -b nrf52840dk/nrf52840 -d build-ble-nrfdk lichen/apps/gateway.
- Observe Kconfig aborting with 'LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD defined without a type' when warnings are treated as errors.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Gateway Kconfig no longer emits 'LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD defined without a type'.
- Affected no-hardware gateway board builds can get past Kconfig parsing.
- The Meshtastic BLE payload default remains 200 when that compatibility surface is enabled.
notes:
Fixed gateway Kconfig override by adding int type to LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD in lichen/apps/gateway/Kconfig before the conditional default. This removes the 'defined without a type' Kconfig warning/error while preserving the subsystem definition.

Evidence: nrf52840dk/nrf52840, t_echo, and r1_neo gateway board builds all passed Kconfig parsing and completed. Meshtastic compatibility validation: west build -b nrf52840dk/nrf52840 -d build-gateway-meshtastic-nrfdk lichen/apps/gateway -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=meshtastic_compat.conf: PASS, generated .config contains CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE=y and CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD=200; FLASH 211720 B/1 MB 20.19%, RAM 82308 B/256 KB 31.40%. Native_sim with meshtastic_compat.conf correctly could not enable BLE because native_sim lacks BT/BT_PERIPHERAL/BT_MAX_CONN dependencies; not treated as compatibility evidence.

bd doctor passed with only pre-existing missing pre-push hook warning. bd lint reports pre-existing template warnings outside these active Beads; active Beads have acceptance criteria. Final three-agent review reported no P0/P1/P2 findings.
close_reason: Fixed typed Kconfig override for LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD; gateway board builds pass Kconfig and Meshtastic nrf52840dk build generated CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD=200.
